official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the singleton empty-body clear_dialog fixture.

field_notes.body: Singleton unit fixture; proves packet body only, not dialog UI state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound clear_dialog packet framing and dispatch/decode for the singleton empty-body fixture only; do not infer dialog UI behavior or show_dialog semantics.
